login.title: Login
login.manage_freedom: Manage your operation with total freedom.
login.recovery_desc: Enter your email to receive a reset link.
login.recovery_success_msg: If the email exists in this installation, you will receive a recovery link.
login.error: Error logging in. Please check your credentials.
login.email_not_confirmed: Email not confirmed. Please check your inbox.
login.too_many_requests: Too many attempts. Please wait a moment.

activation.title: Activation Portal
activation.desc: Sign in to manage your license and installation.
activation.link_sent: If the email **{{email}}** is associated with an active license, we have sent an access link to you.
activation.link_expiry: The link expires in 10 minutes. Also check your spam folder.
activation.token_info: Installation token? Use the link we sent by email.

errors.missing_config: Critical configuration error. Please contact support.

setup.title: Welcome
setup.desc: Let's create your Administrator account to access the system.
setup.success_desc: Your administrator account has been created.
setup.confirm_email_desc: We have sent a confirmation link to:
setup.confirm_step_1: Check your inbox and also the spam/junk folder
setup.confirm_step_2: Click on the confirmation link in the email
setup.confirm_step_3: After confirming, log in with your credentials
setup.already_admin_error: The system already has an administrator for this installation. Redirecting to login...
setup.critical_error_no_id: Critical error: Installation ID not found.

register.form_subtitle: Your free license is one step away.
register.name_placeholder: What would you like to be called?
register.email_exists_error: Email already registered. Use another one or recover your password.
register.consent_desc: I agree to share my data with the indicated partner for technical support and welcome to the ecosystem.
register.success_desc: We have sent a confirmation link to: {{email}}. Access your email to activate your free license.
